name: hive-mcp-credit-broker
description: Broker-only credit/lending discovery shim. Surfaces real lending markets from licensed/established third-party protocols (Aave v3, Compound v3, Morpho Blue, Spark, Maple, Goldfinch). Hive does not lend, originate, hold collateral, or service debt. MCP 2024-11-05 over Streamable-HTTP.
author: Steve Rotzin <steve@thehiveryiq.com> (https://www.thehiveryiq.com)
